2606.28747.title: Self-Supervised Theorem Discovery in a Formal Axiomatic System
2606.28747.paper_summary: Recent artificial intelligence (AI) systems have shown remarkable progress in mathematical reasoning. Many existing approaches, including large language models (LLMs), draw on human prior knowledge in the form of mathematical text, code, or theorem libraries. Although these approaches are highly effective in practice, it remains an open question whether an agent can autonomously discover useful theorems without such human priors. We study this question in a formal axiomatic system by developing an agent that starts from axioms and inference rules alone and gradually grows a library of useful theorems. Concretely, we propose a self-supervised theorem-discovery algorithm that alternates between proof search and useful-theorem extraction, building a theorem library whose entries are reused as lemmas for subsequent proof search. Experiments show that the agent discovers tens of thousands of theorems and finds proofs for human-written benchmark problems, suggesting that its discoveries include theorems meaningful from a human mathematical perspective. Furthermore, the discovered theorems improve LLM proof performance when provided as prompt lemmas, indicating that they can serve as external knowledge for LLM reasoning. Our results provide evidence that useful theorems can emerge from proof search without relying on human-provided theorem libraries. More broadly, they suggest a path toward self-evolving AI systems for mathematics whose discoveries remain formally verifiable.
2606.28747.paper_summary_zh: 最近的人工智慧（AI）系統在數學推理方面顯示出顯著的進展。<lb/>許多現有的方法，包括大型語言模型（LLMs），依賴於以數學文本、程式碼或定理庫形式的人類先驗知識。<lb/>儘管這些方法在實踐中非常有效，但仍然是一個未解的問題，是否有代理可以在沒有這樣的人類先驗的情況下自主發現有用的定理。<lb/>我們通過在一個正式的公理系統中研究這個問題，開發了一個僅從公理和推理規則開始的代理，並逐步建立一個有用的定理庫。<lb/>具體而言，我們提出了一種自我監督的定理發現算法，該算法在證明搜索和有用定理提取之間交替進行，建立一個定理庫，其條目作為後續證明搜索的引理重複使用。<lb/>實驗顯示，該代理發現了數以萬計的定理，並為人類撰寫的基準問題找到證明，這表明其發現包括從人類數學角度看有意義的定理。<lb/>此外，當這些發現的定理作為提示引理提供時，能改善LLM的證明性能，這表明它們可以作為LLM推理的外部知識。<lb/>我們的結果提供了證據，表明有用的定理可以在不依賴人類提供的定理庫的情況下從證明搜索中出現。<lb/>更廣泛地說，它們暗示了一條通往自我演化的數學AI系統的道路，其發現仍然可以形式上驗證。
2606.28747.author: Kazuki Ota et.al.
2606.28747.authors: Kazuki Ota, Takayuki Osa, Tatsuya Harada
